form_name: R2R - Finance Master Data - Cost Center_Profit Center

questions.text: What is a key improvement in Financial Master Data management after implementing NEO?
options: Common process to define and maintain Financial Master Data
Additional work is needed for global reporting

questions.text: NEO has introduced a customized process for each entity to manage their Financial Master Data.
Which system is used to manage the Profit Center creation process in NEO?
What happens when an Indirect PO is created using a Cost Center in the MyMarket workflow?
options: The budget responsible approval step is determined.
The controller approval step is automatically skipped.

questions.text: The Profit Center structure includes a 10-digit external codification with the first four digits dedicated to the Company Code (CoCode).
The Lock indicator for Cost Centers should be set to 'No' by default.
In NEO, a Cost Center can be attached to multiple Company Codes as standard practice.
